questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: How many circles are there in the figure given below?

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: Consider the figure given below and find the least number of colours to be used to fill the figure, if not two adjacent area can have the same colour?

solutions.solution: In the given questions figure, we start counting of circles and mark them as 1, 2 and so on and finally we end on getting 12 number of circles as shown in the following figure.
So, there are only 3 colours needed to fill the figure.
